texto: As the world's 'most dynamic' cities seek to manage their own urban growth, American state and local officials have much to offer. Our mayors can share their experiences in urban design, clean energy projects, Smart Grids, codes for energy efficient buildings, transportation safety, and innovative environmental solutions.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Hormats sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “As the world's 'most dynamic' cities seek to manage their own urban growth, American state and lo…” articula inteligencia, environmental, safety em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como safety e world.
